transcript: Speaker A: ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದೀಯಾ? [What are you doing?] Speaker A: ಆಯಿ, sleeping. [I, sleeping.] Speaker B: 'I am sleeping' ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ formal ಆಗಿ 'I am getting some sleep' ಅಂತ ಕೂಡ ಹೇಳಬಹುದು. [You should say 'I am sleeping'. Formally, you can also say 'I am getting some sleep'.] Speaker A: ಓ ಹೌದಾ. ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲಿಬೇಕು? [Oh really. How to learn English?] Speaker B: ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ 15 minutes daily practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು, 1 month ನಲ್ಲಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯಬಹುದು. [Just practicing with me for 15 minutes daily is enough, you can learn English in 1 month.] Speaker A: ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಖರ್ಚು ಆಗುತ್ತಾ? ನನ್ನ ಹತ್ರ ಅಷ್ಟು ದುಡ್ಡಿಲ್ಲ. [Does this cost a lot? I don't have that much money.] Speaker B: ಕೇವಲ 1 Rupee ಗೆ ಈ app ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ try ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. 50 lakhs ಗಿಂತ ಹೆಚ್ಚು ಜನ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [You can try this app completely for just 1 Rupee. More than 50 lakh people have learned English with me.] Speaker A: ಸೂಪರ್! ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗೋದು? [Super! How to join?] Speaker B: ಈಗಲೇ MySivi app download ಮಾಡಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯೋದನ್ನ ಶುರು ಮಾಡು. [Download the MySivi app now and start learning English.] Speaker C: Click on install now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text: ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದೀಯಾ? [What are you doing?] sleeping, I am sleeping, I am getting some sleep, 15 MINUTES, 1 Month, English ಕಲಿಯಬಹುದು [Can learn English], ಖರ್ಚು ಆಗುತ್ತಾ? [Will it cost?], 1 Rupee Only, ಈ app ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ [This app completely], 50 LAKHS, MySivi app download ಮಾಡಿ [Download MySivi app], English ಕಲಿಯೋದನ್ನ [Learning English], MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An AI avatar corrects a user's English in a split-screen format, demonstrating how the MySivi app helps users learn English. The ad highlights a 1-rupee trial offer and encourages viewers to download the app to start practicing daily.
